metadata.title: Organizational Chart | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Structure of Meezan Bank Limited and the relationships and relative ranks of its parts and positions/jobs.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Mufti Muhammad Naveed Alam Resident Shariah Board Member (RSBM) Muhammad Naveed Alam holds a Masters in Islamic Banking and Finance from University of Karachi and Shahadat ul Alamiyah and Takhassus (specialization in Islamic Jurisprudence and Fatwa) from Jamia Darul Uloom, Karachi. He is also a qualified Certified Shariah Advisor & Auditor CSAA from Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institution (AAOIFI). Mufti Naveed Alam joined Meezan Bank in 2013 as a member of the Shariah Compliance Unit of Shariah Compliance Department. His main responsibilities include Islamic Banking training, Shariah Compliance Review and Shariah Audit of different Departments and Branches. He is an active Teacher/Trainer at Center for Excellence in Islamic Finance (CEIF) of Institute of Business Administration (IBA) Karachi, Center of Islamic Economics (CIE) of Jamia Darul-Uloom Karachi as well as several other renowned universities. Previously, Mufti Naveed Alam has served as Shariah Advisor of Premier Window Takaful Operations and also as Shariah Coordinator at Indus Hospital. is also of the Shariah Board of NBP Funds. Dr. Muhammad Imran Ashraf Usmani Shariah Board Member Dr. Muhammad Imran Usmani, son of Justice (Retd.) Mufti Muhammad Taqi Usmani, holds an LLB, M. Phil, and Ph. D. in Islamic Finance and graduated as a scholar with specialization (Takhassus) in Islamic Fiqh and fatwa from Jamia Darul-Uloom, Karachi. Muhammad Imran Usmani, Shariah Advisor and Group Head of the Product Development & Shariah Compliance Department (PDSC) at Meezan Bank, is responsible for R&D of Islamic banking products, advisory for Shariah-compliant banking and supervision of Shariah Audit & Compliance. Dr. Imran Usmani has served as an advisor / member of Shariah Boards of several renowned institutions since 1997 which includes the State Bank of Pakistan, HSBC - Amanah Finance, UBS - Switzerland, Guidance Financial Group USA, Lloyds TSB Bank - UK, Japan Bank for International Cooperation (JABIC), Credit Suisse Switzerland, RBS Global, Future Growth Albarakah Equity Fund South Africa, AIG Takaful, ACR Retakaful Malaysia, Capitas Group USA, Bank of London And Middle East Kuwait, BMI Bank Bahrain, Al Khaliji Bank Qatar, Sarasin Bank Switzerland, DCD group Dubai and other Mutual and Property funds and international Sukuk etc. He is also an Executive Committee Member of AAOIFI (Dubai) and Shariah Supervisory Board of International Islamic Financial Market (IIFM) Bahrain and International Center for Education in Islamic Finance (INCEIF) Malaysia, of Business Administration (IBA), Karachi and Center for Islamic Economics (CIE), Karachi. Dr. Imran Usmani is the author of numerous publications related to Islamic finance and other Shariah-related subjects. He has presented papers in numerous national and international seminars and has delivered lectures at academic institutions including Harvard, LSE, LUMS and IBA. Dr. Usmani is also the head of Hira Foundation School, a project of Jamia Darul Uloom Karachi to provide a high standard education from Montessori level to University levels combining conventional modern academics with Islamic teachings. He also serves as a lecturer of different subjects of Shariah and is amongst the administration board of the Jamia Darul-Uloom, Karachi. He is a visiting faculty member at Karachi University and IBA. He has also been leading Friday khuthbah and prayer at a Jamia Mosque for 20 years. Mr. Ahmed Ali Siddiqui Group Head Consumer Finance Ahmed Ali Siddiqui serves as Head Consumer Finance at Meezan Bank. He holds Bachelor’s & Master’s degrees in Business Administration from the Administration (IBA), Karachi with six gold medals. Mr. Siddiqui has over 23 years of Islamic banking experience and has been involved in pioneering Islamic finance initiatives in Pakistan, with expertise in Shariah-compliant product development, sovereign Sukuk structuring, banking solutions, policy, training, Shariah audit, research, and advisory. Before assuming his current role, Mr. Siddiqui served as a Secretary to the Shariah Supervisory Board and as Group Head Shariah Compliance at Meezan Bank, where he led one of the world’s largest Islamic banking research functions. He is also the Founding Director of Business Administration Centre in Islamic Finance (IBA CEIF), a global hub for Islamic finance research, education, and training. Mr. Siddiqui is part of the Joint Financial Advisors team to the Government of Pakistan for the issuance of local currency sovereign Sukuk and other Islamic financing transactions. He also led the consortium of Islamic banks in Pakistan for the Pakistan Energy Sukuk I & II issued by the Ministry of Energy, Government of Pakistan, and led the team the issuance of Pakistan’s first listed Sovereign Green Sukuk. Mr. Siddiqui has served on and is a member of State Bank-level task force on Islamic banking products, regulations, governance, accounting disclosures, and the adoption of for Islamic Financial Institutions (AAOIFI) Shariah Standards. He was named in the Islamica 500 in 2017 and 2019, and is a Founding Trustee of Ihsan Trust, where he served as Managing Trustee until 2022. Mr. Irfan Siddiqui Founding President & CEO Mr. Irfan Siddiqui is the founding President and CEO of Meezan Bank since 1997 to date. He is also member of Information Technology Committee and IFRS 9 Committee of the Board. Having articled with Coopers & Lybrand, London from 1975 - 1979, Mr. Siddiqui qualified as a Chartered Accountant the Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales. His distinguished career includes several senior management roles, such as Chief Executive Officer at Al Meezan Investment Bank Limited, General Manager at Pakistan Kuwait Investment Company, Chairman of Al Meezan Investment Management, Advisor to the Managing Director at Kuwait Investment Authority, Manager of Finance and Operations at Abu Dhabi Investment Company, and Senior Business Analyst at Exxon Chemical (Pakistan) Ltd. Current Directorships: Member of Board of Trustees - Islamic Financial Institutions (AAOIFI), Bahrain Chairman of the Board of Directors, Al-Meezan Investment Management Limited Member of IBA Centre of Excellence in Islamic Finance, (CEIF), Board of Management Member Steering Committee for providing strategic guidance regarding implementation of Federal Shariat Court (FSC)’s judgement on Riba Chairman of Steering Committee on Media Campaign - Improving Islamic Finance Literacy Member of Government of Pakistan sub-committee on awareness, training and capacity building for Promotion of Islamic Banking in Pakistan Council Member, Institute of Bankers Pakistan (IBP) Other Recent Offices held: President of the Overseas Investors Chamber of Commerce and Industry (Feb-2021 to Jan-2022) Government of Pakistan Steering Committee for 'Promotion Islamic Banking in Pakistan' (2013 - 2016) Mr. Muhammad Farhan Ul Haq Usmani Head Shariah Audit Ul Haq Usmani holds Baccalaureate in Business Administration and Commerce, Masters and M. Phil. in Economics from University of Karachi, Pakistan. is also a Certified Islamic Banker from for Islamic Economics (CIE) - A division of Jamia Dar ul Uloom Karachi, Chaired by Justice (Retd.) Muhammad Taqi Usmani. Mr. Usmani joined Meezan Bank Limited in the year 2005 where his main areas of responsibility include Product Development & Implementation, Islamic Banking Policy making & Implementation, Islamic Finance trainings, Shariah Controls, Shariah Compliance & Audit and Islamic Financial & Shariah Advisory. Prior to joining Meezan Bank he has worked with various Professional Advisory & Consulting Firms where he was involved in providing consultancy services related to Accounting, Auditing, Taxation and ERP Systems development and implementation. Mr. Usmani is a frequent national & international speaker and faculty member at various leading institutions. is also a senior member of the Federation of Pakistan Chambers of Commerce and Industry’s (FPCCI) committee on Islamic Banking & Takaful and NBFI & Mudarabah. Mr. Usmani a member of academic committee of Centre Islamic Economics (CIE) and Member, Consultative Board – LUMS (CEIF). Syed Imran Ali Shah, Esq. Chief Financial Officer Syed Imran Ali Shah is serving as the Chief Financial Officer Meezan Bank since September, 2022. He joined the Bank in March, 2021 as a Financial Controller for Retail, Commercial / SME & Agricultural Banking and was subsequently also given the financial oversight of the Consumer Finance department. In his previous role at Meezan Bank, Mr. Shah was pivotal in spearheading Roshan Apna Ghar (housing finance / real estate investment product for Non-Resident Pakistanis) under the Roshan Digital Accounts initiative, where he led the industry efforts in designing, marketing and launching the product in close coordination with State Bank of Pakistan. Mr. Shah holds an Executive MBA with distinction from London Business School, UK, and has a BSc (Hons) degree from London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE). is also a Fellow member in England and Wales and a Chartered Financial Analyst from the CFA Institute. Mr. Shah started his career with KPMG in the United Kingdom, where he trained as a Chartered Accountant. He has had a distinguished career working with some of the most prestigious global financial institutions in the world including Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank in progressively senior roles in the areas of Finance, Treasury, Advisory and Risk Management. His last assignment was with Deutsche Bank in London where he was working within Group Treasury. Mr. Khalid Zaman Khan Group Head Human Resources, Learning & Development Khalid Zaman Khan a Masters in Human Resources Management and has also attended a number of leadership and strategy programs in Singapore, Hong Kong, China, U.A.E, and Pakistan. With over 25 years of experience in the field of Human Resources Management, he has held several key positions including serving with HSBC Bank Pakistan and Abu Dhabi as Country Head of Human Resources & Learning. He implemented Broad Banding in Pakistan and his forte includes Talent and Performance Management. He has also worked as of Human Resources at Karachi Stock Exchange dully supported by the Asian Development Bank (ADB). He has been a part of the core team who implemented capital market reforms in the Karachi Stock Exchange. has also worked at Commercial Union Life Assurance Company (Pakistan) Limited, and New Zealand Immigration Services, Government of New Zealand. Khalid Zaman Khan is currently serving as Senior Executive Vice President and Learning & Development at Meezan Bank Limited. He member of the Senior Management team as well as the Secretary to the Board’s Human Resources & Remuneration Committee. Khalid Zaman Khan was also elected as the Vice President of Pakistan Society of Human Resources Management (PSHRM) for two terms. member of the Management Association of Pakistan (MAP) and is a regular speaker/panelist at seminars, conferences, and business schools. He has been appointed as an Independent Director (2017-2020) on the Board of National Clearing Company of Pakistan Limited (NCCPL) where he serves member of the Human Resources and Nomination Committee. Besides, he also chaired the Audit Committee of the NCCPL. Currently, he is also serving on the Academic Board of Bankers Pakistan (IBP) Mr. Muhammad Sohail Khan Company Secretary Mr. Sohail Khan is the Company Secretary Meezan Bank since February 2017. He holds an MBA Institute of Business Administration, Karachi and a Bachelors degree in Engineering from NED University. He has over thirty experience in the financial sector and has held senior positions in both business and support functions in large financial institutions. Mr. Sohail Khan has been associated with Meezan Bank since 2000 from the days Al Meezan Investment Bank. During his association with Meezan Bank, he has handled key positions including Head of Car Ijarah, Human Resources & Administration and Head of Marketing. last assignment was as Head of Learning and Development, Corporate Communication and Innovation. has also been actively involved in imparting Islamic Finance training, both in-house and on various external forums. Mr. Muhammad Umar Khan Fareedy Head Legal Affairs Mr. Umar Khan completed his Bachelors in Law (LL.B.) from University of Punjab in 2004 and received Gold Medal on securing overall first position. Later, he went to University of Karachi for his Masters in Law (LL.M.) where he also secured distinctions. In addition to his professional qualifications, Mr. Fareedy is also a Masters in English Literature from Baha-ud-Din Zakariya University, Multan. Mr. Fareedy his career with Cornelius, Lane & Mufti in June, 2004 was involved in the legal audit of Saudi Pak Commercial Bank, Bank Alfalah and Habib Bank Limited. He joined Warid Telecom Pakistan as Assistant Manager - Legal Affairs in July 2006 and served there till 2010. Later, he served as Civil Judge in Districts of Depalpur and Sheikhupura from 2010 till 2014. last assignment was Manager Legal Affairs/Head of Litigation for Beaconhouse Group. Dr. Syed Amir Ali President & Chief Executive Officer Syed Amir Ali is a distinguished Islamic banking professional with over two decades of experience spanning across finance, treasury, corporate and investment banking. He currently serves as President & CEO of Meezan Bank, Pakistan’s largest Islamic bank, where he provides strategic leadership focused on sustainable growth, corporate governance, and long-term value creation. member of the Executive Committee of the Pakistan Banks Association and serves on the boards of Al Meezan Investments and Meezan Exchange, contributing to the development and oversight of Pakistan’s Islamic financial ecosystem. Dr. Ali Meezan Bank in 2006 in Investment Banking and later led the Corporate & Investment Banking Group. He served & CEO of BankIslami Pakistan from 2018 to 2023, where he successfully led a major turnaround. During his tenure, BankIslami’s profitability increased nearly 50 times, reflecting a comprehensive transformation in strategy, business operations, and financial performance. Earlier in his career, he worked with A. F. Ferguson (member of PwC), Pakistan Refinery and Shell, gaining extensive experience across assurance, energy, and multinational environments. Dr. Ali is a Harvard Business School alumnus, a CFA Charterholder, and a Chartered Accountant (Gold Medalist). He also holds PhD, MBA (Gold Medalist), and LLB degrees, and has completed a Certificate in Software Engineering, reflecting his interest in technology-driven financial innovation and digital transformation. Mr. Zia ul Hasan Chief Operating Officer - Retail Banking Zia ul Hasan serves as - Retail Banking at Meezan Bank, leading the nationwide branch network and driving the retail banking strategy. He oversees business development, customer experience, deposit mobilization, distribution network, and the Bank’s operations backbone, including general banking, trade finance, credit administration, treasury back office, equity operations, and mutual funds. He joined Meezan in 2006 has held senior roles such as Group Head of Operations and Internal Audit. Earlier, he served as Joint Director at State Bank of Pakistan’s Banking Policy Department, contributing to sector-wide policy formulation. Mr. Hasan serves on key management committees, including ALCO, IT Steering, and Compliance & Operational Risk, and chairs multiple strategic committees within the Bank. He also holds the position of the Board of Directors of Meezan Exchange Ltd. an MBA from LUMS, MSc in Economics from Quaid-e-Azam University, and is a Gold Medalist in DAIBP. He is a Certified Internal Auditor (CIA), Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Fraud Examiner (CFE), and Financial Services Auditor (CFSA). He has also completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School and executive leadership studies at Cornell University. Mr. Muhammad Abdullah Ahmed Group Head Transaction & International Banking Muhammad Abdullah Ahmed has 25 years of diversified banking experience covering Corporate Banking, treasury, Financial Institutions, Correspondent Banking, Home Remittances, Transaction Banking, and Supply Chain Financing. He has worked at Bank of America NA, National Bank of Pakistan, and Khalid Ali Shah Bukhari (KASB) Bank before joining Meezan Bank in 2005. Mr. Abdullah has Bachelor’s and Master’s degree of Business Administration, University of He is a fellow of the Association Cambiste Internationale (ACI) - The Financial Markets Association, Paris in financial markets trading and fellow the Institute of Bankers is also a certified Financial Risk Manager (FRM) from the Global Association of Risk Professionals (GARP), USA as well as a certified Omega Credit Skills Assessment (CSA) professional. Mr. Abdullah has been an active member of the local Financial Markets Association of Pakistan (FMAP) from 2000-2012. He was member Pakistan Banks Association (PBA) sub-committee on Treasury and Capital Markets from 2010-2018 and the Technical Committee of the Association of Pakistan from 2012-2018. He is currently a member of The Overseas Commerce and Industry (OICCI) sub-committee on Trade & Industry since 2019. Mr. Shahzad Abdullah Group Head and Capital Markets Mr. Shahzad Abdullah is currently heading both and Capital Markets functions of the Bank. He carries with him over 27 of experience in Treasury, having managed both Islamic and Conventional portfolios in his respective organizations. Before Meezan Bank in 2013, has worked with Emirates Bank International PJSC and Bank Alfalah Limited in senior positions in Treasury. He holds Masters Business Administration (IBA), Karachi. Mr. Abdullah has extensive understanding of Shariah Compliant Treasury Products as well as analytical thinking and decision-making expertise of portfolio construction, trading and funding strategies given the investment avenues available. is also member of the Financial Market Association of Pakistan and also represents Meezan Bank in Technical Committee of FMAP. Mr. Shariq Mubeen Chief Digital Officer Mr. Shariq Mubeen Meezan Bank in December, 2016 he served as Head of Alternate Distribution Channels (ADC) business for six years prior to taking charge as Chief Digital Officer in 2023. As Head of ADC, Mr. Mubeen led the ADC channels and products including cards, e-commerce, mobile app, internet banking, digital payments, ATM network, fintech program, POS acquiring, payment gateway and call center. Under his supervision, Meezan Bank set new benchmarks and achieved market leadership in many of its ADC products and services. Mr. Mubeen holds 22 of diversified banking and consulting experience in leading roles. to joining Bank, has worked with JS Bank as Head of ADC and Cash Management, Teradata Corporation as Banking Industry Consultant, FIS Global as Project Manager, Atlas Bank as Liability Products Head, NCR Banking Industry Consultant, KASB Bank as Product Development Manager and Union Bank as Brand Manager where he started his professional career as Management Trainee in 2001. Mr. Mubeen completed his BBA (Hons) and MBA From IBA Karachi in year 2000. Mr. Muhammad Raza Group Head General Services and Customer Support Mr. Muhammad Raza holds a B.E. degree from the NED University of Engineering & Technology and a Master’s degree Business Administration from Institute of Business Management (IoBM). He also has a DAIBP (Diploma Associate Institute of Bankers Pakistan) from Institute of Bankers Pakistan, a Post Graduate Diploma and Finance from the Centre of Islamic Economics and an Islamic Scholar Course (Dars e Nizami) from Al-Furqan Scholars Academy. Mr. Raza has 32 diversified banking experience the areas of Retail and Consumer Banking including over 20 years of experience as an Islamic banker the areas of Branch Banking, Liability Sales, Product Development, Service Quality, Consumer Finance, Wealth Management, Training, Marketing and Strategy. He started his banking career with MCB as a Branch Manager and a Chief Manager and Meezan Bank in February, 2003 a Branch Manager of their flagship branch at Gulshan-e-Iqbal and was later given the task of opening another flagship branch in the F. B. Area. Mr. Raza currently serves as the Group Head, Services and Customer Support, looking after multiple functions including Administration, Security, Product Development, Service Quality and Strategy Support. Mr. Faizur Rehman Group Head Information Technology Mr. Faizur Rehman is an MBA with bi-majors in Operations Management and Finance. He is also amongst the very few Certified Software Quality Professionals in Pakistan. He has over 16 the field of Information Technology bringing with him the versatile experience of manufacturing sector, management companies, traders, distribution companies and especially financial sector (DFIs, Modarabas, Leasing, Housing Finance and Commercial & Investment Banks). last assignment was at Zensoft Private Limited, an information technology solution provider company part of the renowned Ghulam Faruque Group of companies where he was the General Manager. Prior to that he was the Senior Vice President and Head of MISD in Bankers Equity Limited. He also worked for Systems Research (Private) Ltd. as Project Manager, whereas he started his career from Jaffer Brothers (Pvt.) Ltd. At Meezan Bank he is responsible for planning the current and future strategies of the Information Technology division in line with the Bank's strategic plans, also responsible for managing implementation, customization and 24x7 support of the integrated banking and remote banking solutions. Coordination with the software vendor and development of ancillary modules is also part of his responsibilities. Syed Tariq Hassan Chief Risk Officer (CRO) & Group Head Risk Management Syed Tariq Hassan is a CFA Charter Holder, of Business Administration, Karachi, and a DAIBP Bankers He banking experience in Corporate Banking, Investment Banking and Risk Management. Meezan Bank in 2008, he had been associated with UBL as Senior Vice President/Unit Head, Corporate Banking Group and Askari Bank as Head, Corporate Banking Division. His last assignment before joining Risk Management Group at Meezan Bank was Head of Corporate Banking (South), Meezan Bank. Being the Chief Risk Officer and Head Risk Management Meezan Bank, his responsibilities include management of risk exposures by development of risk policies, strategies, processes, limits structures, tools and techniques at entity level. Syed Fahd Azam Head Information Security Syed Fahd Azam holds an MBA degree from Shaheed Zulfikar Ali Bhutto Institute of Science and Technology (SZABIST), Karachi and a BS in Computer Engineering degree from Sir Syed University of Engineering and Technology (SSUET), Karachi. He has international certifications and qualifications including Certified Information System Auditor (CISA), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM), Computer Hacking Forensic Investigator (CHFI) and Lead Auditor (LA) 27001. His career spans over a period of 13 years with working experience of esteem organizations like Habib Bank Limited (HBL), MNET (subsidiary of MCB) and Pak Suzuki Motor Company Limited. His articles have been published on Information System Audit and Control Association (ISACA) 2013 Journal and Pentest Online Magazine. Mr. Anwar-ul-Haq Distribution Head - Central I Joined Meezan Bank in 2002 on the official inauguration day of the bank. He possesses 16 years of rich and diversified commercial banking experience in different positions as Manager, Area Manager, Regional Corporate Head-Central and Regional Manager. Meezan Bank he was associated Emirates Bank International for 08 years mainly the field of Corporate Banking. He has done MBA-Finance with distinction (Gold Medallist) from University of Agriculture, Faisalabad. He is also partly qualified the field of Chartered Accountancy (CA-Inter) from The Institute of Chartered Accountant in Pakistan. He attended various advance business courses on Leadership, Corporate Financial Management, Strategic Management and Islamic Banking & Finance. His primary responsibilities include marketing & management of the Bank’s various Corporate, SME/Commercial portfolios and retail branch functions in the Faisalabad Region widely spread over 12 cities of Punjab. He is also involved in internal-training. Syed Salman Ahmed Distribution Head - South Syed Salman Ahmed Meezan Bank in 2014 as General Manager and serves as the Head - South at the Bank. In this role, is responsible for managing the Bank’s largest business portfolio, overseeing six regions, including Karachi, Hyderabad, and Balochistan. His responsibilities include managing deposits and advances, expanding market presence, and ensuring service quality, revenue growth, and cost discipline across the region. Mr. Ahmed an MBA degree and is a certified professional of the National Institute of Banking and Finance (NIBAF). He has also attended various advanced business and professional development programs in leadership, corporate financial management, strategic management, and Islamic banking and finance. He possesses over 29 years of extensive and banking experience in Retail, Commercial, Consumer and SME segments. Before Meezan Bank, he served as Regional Manager of Central Punjab at Bank Alfalah and Head of Islamic Banking at NIB Bank. Mr. Abid Hussain Malik Head - Central II Abid Hussain Malik serves as Distribution Head Central II at Meezan is responsible for overseeing distribution, branch operations, and business development within the Bank’s Central II region. Mr. Malik holds an MBA in Marketing, Master’s degree in Economics, and a Diploma of Associate Institute of Bankers of Pakistan (DAIBP). has also completed professional certifications from Moody’s Analytics and the IBA Excellence in Islamic Finance. Mr. Malik has over 33 of experience in banking, including more than 14 years with Meezan Bank Limited. His experience spans branch operations, trade and financing, area and regional management, and cluster-based distribution. Mr. Shaikh Raashed Rauf Distribution Head - North Shaikh Raashed Rauf Meezan Bank in 2022. Head - North at Meezan Bank, catering to Retail Branch Banking as well as SME and Commercial Credit portfolios. Mr. Rauf MBA degree from Quaid-e-Azam University, Islamabad. has also completed several professional certifications, including a Certificate of Commercial Credit from Moody’s (OMEGA), a Certification in Accounting Finance from the University of Victoria Technology, Melbourne, Australia, and a certificate on “Creating and Building High Performing Teams” from the Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania, USA. In addition, he has attended various local and international training programs in management, leadership, personal effectiveness, and strategic planning. Mr. Rauf experience in banking, with exposure across Branch Banking, Retail, SME, Commercial and Corporate Banking, Consumer Finance, and Credit Risk Management. His career includes senior leadership roles at Meezan Bank, Allied Bank Limited, and Bank Alfalah Limited, where he has led large banking networks and managed diverse business portfolios. Mr. Shayan Ahmed Baig Head Shariah Compliance Shayan Ahmed Baig serves as the Head the Shariah Compliance Department this role, he oversees the Shariah Board Secretariat, and is responsible for Shariah review of banking operations, product development, pool management, branch and departmental compliance reviews, and Shariah training across the Bank. Mr. Baig holds an MBA and BBA Business Administration (IBA), Karachi, and is a Advisor & Auditor (CSAA) from AAOIFI. He also holds a Certificate in Credit from Moody’s Analytics. Mr. Baig has over 19 years of diversified experience in Islamic banking, Shariah compliance, product structuring, and corporate banking. He has been extensively involved in the Shariah structuring and documentation of complex Islamic finance transactions, including Government of Pakistan Sukuk program and Sukuk I & II. He has also contributed significantly to the development of Meezan Bank’s corporate, SME, trade finance, supply chain finance, consumer, and retail banking products, including the digital supply chain financing platform. Mr. Rizwan Qamar Lari Group Head Internal Audit Rizwan Qamar Lari is the Head Internal Audit is responsible for leading the Bank’s Internal Audit function and providing independent assurance to the Board Audit Committee, with a focus on governance, internal controls, and risk management. Mr. Lari is a Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA). Mr. Lari of in Islamic banking, financial management and enterprise governance. senior leadership roles in Pakistan and the GCC, including positions at BankIslami, Alinma Bank, Saudi Arabia, and KPMG Pakistan and the UAE. He has represented the banking industry on several committees of the Saudi Central Bank, contributing to industry-wide initiatives relating to the implementation of IFRS, Basel standards, and taxation frameworks. He has also served as of the Board Audit Committee at Shakarganj Food Products Limited. Mr. Masood Muhammad Khan Chief Compliance Officer Masood Muhammad Khan is the Chief Compliance Officer of responsible for overseeing the Bank’s compliance function, including regulatory compliance and AML and CFT frameworks. Mr. Khan holds Bachelor’s degrees in Commerce and Law, along with Master’s degree in International Studies. Mr. Khan has extensive experience in banking and compliance, with a career spanning over 28 years. he served as Group Head Compliance at BankIslami Pakistan Limited for 11 years. He has also held senior positions at Bank AL Habib, Askari Bank, and Silk Bank. addition, he has served in the Financial Crime Wing of the National Accountability Bureau (NAB), providing him with valuable public-sector exposure. Syed Tanveer Hussain Operating Officer - Wholesale Banking Syed Tanveer Hussain Bank in 2013 and serves as a Officer - Wholesale Banking. he oversees the Bank’s advances portfolio, including Corporate, Commercial, SME, Agri, and Investment Banking. Mr. Hussain is an Advanced Management Program graduate of Harvard Business School. England and Wales (ACA), a Fellow of the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (FCCA), and MBA of Business Administration, Karachi. Mr. Hussain has in banking, with a strong focus on Islamic banking and credit management. He has since played a key role in the development and strengthening of the Bank’s financing portfolio, a focus on maintaining sound credit quality and low levels of non-performing loans. Bank, he served at Bank Alfalah Islamic Banking for seven years, he led the Corporate Banking South segment and managed Shariah-compliant financing portfolios. Mr. Urooj ul Hasan Khan Group Head Corporate, Investment Banking and Shariah Advisory Urooj Hasan as the Group Head of Corporate, Investment Banking & Shariah Advisory overseeing the Bank’s corporate and investment banking businesses, capital market activities, and Shariah advisory function. Mr. Khan is an Associate Member of Chartered Accountants of Pakistan (ICAP) and holds the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation from the CFA Institute, USA, well as the Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (CIMA), United Kingdom, qualification. Mr. Khan has decades of experience across corporate and investment banking, financial and risk advisory, Shariah advisory, and audit. He began his career with PwC Pakistan, where he provided assurance and advisory services to local and international financial institutions. Over the course of his career, he been involved in several finance transactions, including Pakistan’s first Islamic project financing, the country’s inaugural series of short-term sukuk, and multiple sovereign sukuk issuances for the Government of Pakistan. has also contributed the development of institutional frameworks for organizations such as EXIM Bank Pakistan, Pakistan-Kuwait Investment Company, and Raqami Islamic Digital Bank. addition to his institutional responsibilities, Mr. Khan is associated with various industry bodies, including Commerce and Industry (OICCI). He also contributes to the Energy and Access to Finance Working Group, a joint initiative of the Government of Sindh and the World Bank, focused on strengthening SME and agricultural financing in Pakistan. He is also a qualified Certified Shariah Advisor & Auditor CSAA from Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institution (AAOIFI). He is an active Teacher/Trainer at Center for Excellence in Islamic Finance (CEIF) of Institute of Business Administration (IBA) Karachi, Center of Islamic Economics (CIE) of Jamia Darul-Uloom Karachi as well as several other renowned universities. Previously, Mufti Naveed Alam has served as Shariah Advisor of Premier Window Takaful Operations and also as Shariah Coordinator at Indus Hospital. is also of the Shariah Board of NBP Funds. D. in Islamic Finance and graduated as a scholar with specialization (Takhassus) in Islamic Fiqh and fatwa from Jamia Darul-Uloom, Karachi.
